decisions.title: Diagnostic modes use only existing monitor and config signals
decisions.description: Refresh mode is derived from bootstrap.reconcile_interval plus CONFIGCTL_EVENTS durable state in jsz. The classifier uses pending, ack_pending, redelivered, delivered, ack_floor, last_active, and ts without adding runtime endpoints.
alternatives: Add a dedicated refresh health endpoint in the Go runtime
Use service logs as primary input for refresh mode classification

decisions.title: Refresh status stays binary; degraded gets explicit mode
decisions.description: Trace-pack keeps healthy or degraded as the top-level refresh status, but degraded now carries a canonical refresh mode so operators can distinguish telemetry loss, config drift, transient lag, and stalled refresh.
alternatives: Promote refresh mode to the primary status instead of keeping healthy/degraded
Keep degraded as a single bucket and only vary the prose in diagnosis
